stemHtml: During flight, a change of a flight plan from IFR to VFR can only be accepted when…

options.a: ATC has verified that all other ATS units to whom the IFR flight plan was addressed, agree with the change.
options.b: ATC has verified that VFR conditions will be available throughout the remainder of the flight.
options.c: It has been initiated by the pilot.
options.d: It has been initiated by ATC.
